candidate.objective: Proactive and skilled machine operator with over 7 years of experience across civil construction, earthworks, logging, and infrastructure sectors. Dedicated and hardworking individual with excellent time management and the ability to work effectively both independently and as part of a team. Experienced operating a range of heavy plant including bobcats, 14t and 20t diggers, 290t excavators, graders, loaders, grapples, and dozers. Demonstrated capacity to step into foreman and specialist operator roles, taking responsibility for drain laying, trench work, and earthworks quality.

duties: Operated bobcats and 14-tonne excavators on residential and rural projects.
Carried out house foundation excavation, demolition, farm tracking, and water tabling works.
Maintained equipment in safe and serviceable condition at all times.
Operated 14-tonne and 20-tonne excavators, graders, loaders, grapples, and dozers on civil infrastructure projects.
Performed drain laying, trenching, and earthworks to specification.
Carried out fusion welding on pipeline projects.
Acted in a foreman capacity, coordinating crew activities and ensuring quality and safety compliance.
Liaised with supervisors and project management regarding daily production and progress.
Operated 20-tonne and 290-tonne excavators and grapples in a logging and forestry environment.
Constructed and maintained haul roads and road-lining works.
Ensured machinery was operated safely and in compliance with site procedures.

skills.detail: Experienced operating bobcats, 14t–20t and 290t excavators, grapples, graders, loaders, and dozers across civil construction, forestry, and infrastructure projects.
Skilled in house foundations, demolition, farm tracking, water tabling, drain laying, trenching, and earthworks to design specifications.
Performed fusion welding on pipeline projects while employed with Fulton Hogan.
Demonstrated ability to work as part of a team and independently. Stepped into foreman roles, coordinating crews and liaising with project management.

certifications.details: Formal qualifications and tickets to be confirmed. ACM to advise.

referees: Professional references available upon request. Please contact ACM Resources to facilitate introduction.
